summary: Iteration 2 — Full e2e verification of P1a (SEO prerender), P1c (Marketplace seed 29 products), P1d (Voice Whisper STT + Voice Listing modal). All 8 new backend tests PASS + all 15 regression tests from iter1 PASS (23/23). All 3 critical frontend flows PASS (marketplace mic button, seller dashboard voice modal, login + verify page regression).

minor.issue: When audio is empty or has unrecognized format (e.g. /dev/null or 0-byte file), endpoint returns HTTP 500 with structured JSON detail from Whisper BadRequestError. Acceptable per spec (no crash, JSON returned) but ideally should translate BadRequestError → 400. Valid WAV files, missing body (422) and >25MB (413) all work as expected.

issues: Some product images (e.g. Dairy Goat, Day-Old Broiler Chicks, DK8031 Maize Seed) rendered empty/black boxes on initial paint while others loaded — may be slow Unsplash CDN or lazy-loading at time of screenshot; 29 tags confirmed present in DOM. Worth double-checking image URL validity for agriculture/food category seed items.

action_items: (Minor) Map Whisper BadRequestError → HTTP 400 instead of 500 in /api/voice/transcribe so invalid/empty audio returns a client-error status.
(Optional) Verify Unsplash image URLs for all 29 seed products render within 2s — some agriculture entries appeared slow/black during initial page paint.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 3700+ lines (added voice + seo routes). Recommend splitting into routers: routers/voice.py, routers/seo.py — matches the split suggested in iter1.
Voice endpoint: 25MB size check is good but error translation from emergentintegrations OpenAISpeechToText exceptions should be centralized (BadRequest→400, timeout→504, rate-limit→429).
SEO prerender: product/{id} lookup should index on both 'id' and legacy 'seed_xxx' prefix; verify that crawlers (Cloudflare Worker) route to the right URL scheme per PRD snippet.

success_rate.frontend: 100% critical flows (marketplace mic, voice-listing modal open/close, login+dashboard, /verify regression)

test_credentials: Primary: +255712345678 / test1234 — verified login → /dashboard navigation works.
seed_data_creation: No new seed needed. Marketplace DB confirmed ≥29 products via /api/products/public with all 6 categories (fashion, electronics, home, beauty, food, agriculture) present and every item has image + category.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter2_features.py covers SEO, seed, and voice. /api/voice/transcribe uses Whisper via emergentintegrations — synthetic WAV (1s, 440Hz sine, 16kHz mono) via python wave module works and returns {'text': str} even for pure sine — no ffmpeg needed. Voice listing modal close-button selector was caught via OR-list (aria-label, Close text, ×, or data-testid='voice-listing-close-btn'). If you add more tests, remember REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to preview env and Whisper calls take ~1-3s (test completed in <3s total). Install App button IS present in Navbar (visible in dashboard.png screenshot) — text-based selector alone didn't catch it because it's in an icon-wrapper.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs to RCA this round. Minor: voice endpoint returning 500 for invalid audio — root cause is unhandled litellm.BadRequestError from OpenAISpeechToText bubbling through FastAPI default 500. Fix: wrap the transcribe call in try/except litellm.BadRequestError and raise HTTPException(400, detail=...).
